title: 0502汉堡菜单制作
content:
准备

又看到一个很实用并且比较炫酷的网页效果，拿过来学习一下～

先把链接放出来，有兴趣来学一下Fullscreen Overlay Responsive Navigation Menu | Html5 CSS3 & Javascript - YouTube

HTML

html是我每次写起来最轻松的～hhh

   \ <div id="tog" onclick="menuToggle()"></div> //这一行是的作用是点击触发js函数；
    <div id="menu">
        <ul>
            <li><a href="#">home</a></li>
            <li><a href="#">about</a></li>
            <li><a href="#">photos</a></li>
        </ul>
    </div>\

CSS

*{
margin: 0;
padding: 0;
}
#menu{
position: fixed;
top: 0;
left: 0;
right: 0;
bottom: 0;
background: #f00;
display: flex;
justify-content: center;
align-items: center;
overflow-y: auto;
transform: scale(0);//未激活状态0显示也就是隐藏
transition: 0.5s;
}
#menu.active{
transform: scale(1);//激活状态100%显示
}
#menu ul{
position: relative;
}
#menu ul li{
position: relative;
list-style: none;
text-align: center;
display: block;
}
#menu ul li a{
position: relative;
text-decoration: none;
font-size: 3.5em;
padding: 0 10;
color: #fff;
font-weight: 700;
text-transform: uppercase;
display: inline-block;
}
#menu ul li a:before{
content: ‘’;
position: absolute;
top: 50%;
left: 0;
width: 100%;
height: 8px;
background: #ff0;
transform: translateY(-50%) scaleX(0);
transform-origin: right;
transition: 0.5s transform;
}
#menu ul li a:hover:before{
transform: translateY(-50%) scaleX(1);
transform-origin: left;
transition: 0.5s transform;
}
#tog{
position: fixed;
top: 20px;
right: 20px;
width: 50px;
height: 50px;
background: #ff0;
z-index: 1;
cursor: pointer;
}

JS

js的交互动效与css配合实现；

<\script>
function menuToggle(){
var nav = document.getElementById(‘menu’);//通过函数表达式来抓取元素
nav.classList.toggle(‘active’);//切换元素的类名从而实现显示与隐藏的效果
}
</script>

最终效果
